name: Dex's Fridge Interview
overview: Series of interviews of renowned guests, including actors and K-pop idols, hosted by Kim Jin Young (Dex). In each episode, guests reveal the contents of their refrigerators, showcasing their favorite ingredients and the stories behind them. They’ll also prepare a recipe of their choice, mixing personal stories with delightful cooking.

trailers.title: [Teaser] Dex is a Fridge Interview MC? l Dex's Fridge Interview EP.0
